g.text: SELECT name FROM users WHERE age = 25
Index B+tree: 3 page reads (root → internal → leaf)
Table B-tree: 3 page reads (root → internal → leaf)
Total: 6 page reads per point query
Table reads = random I/O (rowid ≠ sequential offset)
→ stores (age, rowid) only → needs table lookup
CREATE INDEX idx_age_name ON users(age, name)
→ stores (age, name, rowid) → name found in leaf
Covering index: 3 reads total, no table B-tree descent
